questions.question: What three primitives does an MCP server expose?
questions.question_zh: MCP server 暴露的三种 primitive 是什么？
questions.explanation_zh: MCP 把 server 能力抽象为 tools、resources、prompts 三种 primitive。

questions.question: What wire format does MCP use?
questions.question_zh: MCP 使用的线缆格式是什么？
questions.explanation_zh: MCP 协议在 JSON-RPC 2.0 之上构建。

questions.question: Which metadata field signals a tool mutates state and should require human approval?
questions.question_zh: 哪个元数据字段表示某 tool 会修改状态、需要人工审批？
questions.explanation_zh: destructiveHint: true 是 MCP 用来标识需要人工审批的破坏性 tool 的元数据。

questions.question: What is the 2025-06-18 transport that replaced the earlier SSE-only remote transport?
questions.question_zh: 2025-06-18 中替代早期 SSE-only 远程传输的是哪种？
questions.explanation_zh: Streamable HTTP 取代了 SSE-only 的远程传输，统一了远程通信。

questions.question: When should a tool be split into its own MCP server instead of staying inline?
options: When it is called fewer than 10 times per day
When it is called from two or more hosts and is read-only/cacheable
When it returns more than 1KB of data
Never; MCP is only for local dev
questions.question_zh: 什么时候应该把一个 tool 拆成独立的 MCP server，而不是内联实现？
options_zh: 被两个或更多 host 调用，并且是只读/可缓存的
永远不要拆分；MCP 只用于本地开发
questions.explanation_zh: 当 tool 被多个 host 调用、又是只读可缓存时，拆成独立 MCP server 能让多端复用并集中维护。
